---
title: "Current Songs on Repeat"
format: html
page-ayout: full
listing:
  contents: music_data.yml
  type: table
  fields: [title, artist]
  field-links: []
  field-display-names:
    title: "Track"
    artist: "Artist"
---
```{=html}
<style>
/* Prevent text from bunching up and force full width */
.listing-table th, .listing-table td {
  white-space: nowrap !important;
}

/* Make sure the track title column gets the most space */
.listing-table td.listing-title {
  width: 50% !important;
  white-space: normal !important; /* Allows long titles to wrap nicely instead of cutting off */
}
</style>
```
